listitem.para:
A comma separated list of proposals specifying the cryptographic algorithms to negotiate when establishing an &AH; Child SA (Phase 2, IPsec SA). For instance:
ah=sha2_256,sha2_512 ah=sha2_256+sha2_512-dh14+dh19
The basic syntax is: INTEGRITY_ALGORITHMS["-"KEM_ALGORITHMS] For the full syntax, see the Proposals section.
Enabled cryptographic algorithms and default proposals are logged by &pluto; during startup (see &ipsec-pluto.8;).

note.para: &AH; is not recommended. A deployment using tunnel mode can be protected using &ESP; with esp=null (null encryption).
